claim: DeepEval provides built-in bias metric that uses LLM-as-judge to detect gender, racial, and political bias in model outputs; customizable via GEval framework for domain-specific bias criteria
actionable: Use DeepEval bias metric to automatically flag biased responses in your LLM; extend with GEval custom criteria for industry-specific bias concerns (healthcare, finance, etc.).
source_title: The 100% EASIEST Way to Test LLMs & AI Agents (Seriously)

claim: GEval framework allows custom metric creation with evaluation steps that function as LLM-as-judge; enables precise control over what passes/fails compared to built-in metrics
actionable: Define custom GEval metrics with explicit evaluation steps describing how the judge LLM should assess outputs; set passing thresholds (0.0-1.0) aligned to your use case.
source_title: The 100% EASIEST Way to Test LLMs & AI Agents (Seriously)

claim: Built-in DeepEval bias metric sometimes misses bias that custom GEval criteria catch due to threshold differences (7.0 threshold producing false negatives); custom evaluation more reliable
actionable: When built-in metrics give unexpected results, create custom GEval metric with explicit bias criteria and evaluation steps rather than relying on default settings.
source_title: The 100% EASIEST Way to Test LLMs & AI Agents (Seriously)

claim: For fraud detection in financial systems, structure test cases with expected outputs (legitimate/suspicious/fraudulent classification + risk score); evaluate against high-risk transaction flagging accuracy
actionable: Test fraud detection LLM with cases covering normal patterns, unusual timing/amounts, rapid geographic spread; grade on correct fraud flagging and false positive rates.
source_title: The 100% EASIEST Way to Test LLMs & AI Agents (Seriously)

claim: DeepEval with local LLMs (e.g., DeepSeek-R1 in Ollama) enables cost-free evaluation where both application and judge use same model; slower but eliminates API costs
actionable: Run DeepEval test cases against local Ollama models to evaluate LLM applications without API costs; accept slower evaluation speed for comprehensive testing.
source_title: The 100% EASIEST Way to Test LLMs & AI Agents (Seriously)

claim: Confident AI portal integrates with DeepEval to store and visualize test results with detailed evaluation explanations and pass/fail metrics for audit trails
actionable: Connect DeepEval to Confident AI portal for centralized test reporting; enables team visibility into eval results and model performance over time.
source_title: The 100% EASIEST Way to Test LLMs & AI Agents (Seriously)
